item.title: Docker Scan Images for Known Vulnerabilities
item.author: Author
item.description: CVE(Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures) CVE The Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures system provides a reference-method for publicly known information-security vulnerabilities and exposures. CVE Severity Scores CVSS v2.0 Ratings Severity Base Score Range Low 0.0-3.9 Medium 4.0-6.9 High 7.0-10.0 CVSS v3.0 Ratings Severity Base Score Range None 0.0 Low 0.
